title: helianthemum apenninum var. roseum
intro: Helianthemum apenninum var. roseum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the Cistaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote wound healing. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Rockrose can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
